scripts.build: bun build src/background.ts src/sidepanel.ts src/content.ts src/euphoria-capture-bridge.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --format=esm --sourcemap && cp src/content.css dist/content.css
scripts.package: mkdir -p _dist && cp manifest.json _dist/ && cp sidepanel.html _dist/ && cp grove-logo*.png _dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r dist _dist/ && cd _dist && zip -r ../grove-extension.zip . && cd .. && rm -rf _dist
scripts.release: bun run build && bun run package
